display.purpose: Identity moments only: wordmark, screen titles, month names, parish name.

reading.purpose: Feast names and event titles — anywhere the user pauses to read rather than scan.

body.purpose: All interface chrome: buttons, nav, labels, paragraphs.

shadows.name: action-glow
shadows.purpose: Under primary buttons only, to signal the single primary action per screen.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (toggles, button press, screen entry).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action on a screen (Salvează, Intră în cont, Urmărește).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7a1f2b; color: #f6ecd6; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; padding: 14px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 11px; box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(122,31,43,.22); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), transform .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #6a1a24; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7a1f2b; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: .5; box-shadow: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline action, used alongside or instead of the primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fdfcf8; color: #7a1f2b; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; padding: 14px 20px; border: 1px solid #d8cfbb; border-radius: 11px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #7a1f2b; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7a1f2b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field with uppercase micro-label, used across login, registration, profile forms.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: .12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9a8268; } .ds-input { background: #fdfcf8; border: 1px solid #e0d8c6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 13px 14px; font-size: 14px; color: #5a5046; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #7a1f2b; border-width: 1.5px; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #b3a892; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container sitting one step lighter than the parchment page background.
components.html:
Parohia Sfântul Nicolae
Cluj-Napoca · Hram 6 decembrie
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fdfcf8; border: 1px solid #e6dfce; border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Marcellus, Georgia, serif; font-size: 20px; color: #2c2620; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 13px; color: #8a7458; margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Feast Badge
components.description: Small liturgical-note badge (fasting day, feast type).
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .05em; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 6px; } .ds-badge-fast { background: #ece6f5; color: #6a4ea0; }

narrative.overview: Parohia Mea lives on parchment, not on a screen pretending to be one. The system borrows its mood from standing in an empty church nave on a weekday afternoon: cream stone, a little gold catching the light, the deep crimson reserved for the moments that matter — the altar cloth, not the walls. This is the Parchment direction, chosen deliberately over two siblings explored in the same brief: Iconostasis (crimson ground, gold leaf, ornate — too loud for daily use) and Candlelit (near-black with glowing gold — too dark for a screen checked at any hour, and too low-contrast for older users).
keyCharacteristics: Warm parchment ground (#f4f1ea), never stark white, never generic AI beige
Crimson (#7a1f2b) is the one saturated color and it is rationed
Gold is rarer still — thin dividers, small dots, never a fill
One serif for identity (Marcellus), one for reading (Spectral), one sans for UI (Hanken Grotesk)
Flat by default; the only lift is a crimson-tinted glow under primary buttons

rules.name: The Legibility Rule
rules.body: Ink Faint (#9a8268) never carries text a user must read to complete a task — labels and metadata only.

rules.name: The Rationing Rule
rules.body: Crimson fills no more than one element per screen at rest.

rules.name: The One Serif Per Job Rule
rules.body: Marcellus identifies, Spectral narrates, Hanken Grotesk operates — never mix Marcellus and Spectral in the same line.

rules.name: The No Card-on-Card Rule
rules.body: Never nest a Surface-colored card inside another Surface-colored card; use a divider instead.

dos: Do keep the page background Parchment (#f4f1ea) everywhere; cards and inputs step up to Surface (#fdfcf8), never pure white.
Do reserve Crimson fills for exactly one primary action per screen.
Do set feast names and event titles in Spectral.
Do hold contrast to WCAG AA given the audience includes older, non-technical users.
Do use 44px-minimum tap targets on mobile.
donts: Don't build the Iconostasis mood here — no crimson page backgrounds, no gold-leaf ornament.
Don't build the Candlelit mood here — no near-black surfaces, no glowing text-shadow.
Don't ship the placeholder generic-SaaS blue (#1f6feb) — it must be fully replaced.
Don't use gold as a fill for any button or large surface.
Don't stack a Surface card inside another Surface card.
Don't mix Marcellus and Spectral within the same line of text.
